nfo_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26011,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":46007},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468526608427778878","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"多女主，没什么毒点，没漏女（截至目前），没出现有实力还当龟奴的若汁操作，剧情没完全跟原著并且自创的也算尚可，节奏适中，男主人设比较稳没出现前后矛盾自己打脸的情况，原著角色基本不ooc。
槽/亮点:
①作者蛮喜欢狱卒的，大概是因为主角现在是屌虫小鸡，幼起无力吧
②挂很强，但是得要钱，而作者用来限制主角战力的方式就是主角不会赚钱，当然，相比隔壁7岁超影当龟奴的哈基作者就好太多了
③有车，车速不错
④梗很多，笑点很足，看懂这些梗也不需要太高的门槛
总结：值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738904956,"group_id":"7430852747542400062","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1/XstaHoNAwxXH9Jjwh6Jc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3161f9f4df314baf99f5764d6faed791~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533260&x-signature=Ip0Yt63sT05L8lr73PNsi2c5M3Y%3D","user_id":"141214507336943","user_name":"礼貌小🐩上早八"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"141214507336943","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7430852747542400062","book_info":{"abstract":"［系统＋多女＋偏日常］
